title: Better Small Dripleaf
description: Small Dripleaf is plantable on any surface Big Dripleaf can be, and drops itself when destroyed or bonemealed, like tall flowers
body: This mod makes Small Dripleaves a little nicer to work with, and renewable without wandering traders. They now drop themselves when broken, as well as when bonemeal is used on them, and they can be placed on any blocks Big Dripleaf can be placed on, including grass.
